name: PLS Check Cashers
description_short: Located at 140 W 36th St., New York, NY 10018, PLS Check Cashers can be reached at +1 212-563-5568.
description_long: PLS Financial Services, Inc. operates PLS Check Cashers, a multi-state check cashing and financial services network with locations in Arizona, California, Illinois, Indiana, Kentucky, Massachusetts, New York, North Carolina, Ohio, Oklahoma, Texas, and Wisconsin. The company has established itself as a traditional alternative financial services provider serving consumers who need immediate access to cash and financial transaction services. The Chicago location at 4400 W. Armitage Ave. exemplifies their full-service model with 24/7 operations. PLS offers a comprehensive suite of financial services centered around check cashing but extending into money orders, bill payment, wire transfers via Ria Money Transfer, government benefits access, and foreign exchange services. They also provide ancillary services including notary public services, fax and copy operations, phone top-ups, and ATM access. Additionally, PLS offers a branded prepaid debit card (Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard) with a mobile app and business services for commercial customers. What distinguishes PLS is their 24/7 operational model, multi-state presence, and integration of traditional check-cashing services with government benefits access and prepaid card offerings. They position themselves as a convenient alternative to traditional banking with extended hours and accessibility. However, PLS operates in the alternative financial services space where consumers typically pay fees for check cashing and other transactions. The company's reliance on prepaid debit cards and financial products suggests they operate a full alternative banking ecosystem. As with most check cashers, the economics favor the provider—consumers pay fees rather than earning interest, making this suitable only for those without banking access or needing immediate cash conversion.
pros: 24/7 operational hours at all locations including transportation/registration services
Multi-state presence across 11 states with multiple store locations
Comprehensive service integration including government benefits access and foreign exchange
Notary services available for official document certification
Ria Money Transfer partnership enabling domestic and international transfers
Branded prepaid debit card (Xpectations! PLUS Mastercard) with mobile app
Additional services like fax, copy, phone top-ups, and cash/coin exchange
cons: Check cashing and related services involve consumer fees that reduce net cash received
Prepaid debit card model typically includes monthly maintenance fees and transaction costs
No transparent pricing information available on website for check cashing fees or rates
Limited to alternative financial services rather than true banking (no interest-bearing accounts)
Business model targets unbanked/underbanked consumers, suggesting higher transaction costs than traditional banks
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing immediate check conversion without a bank account
Individuals requiring 24/7 access to financial services beyond traditional banking hours
Small business owners seeking check cashing and bill payment services for business operations
diagnosis: PLS Check Cashers is best for consumers without traditional bank accounts who need immediate check conversion, money transfers, or bill payment services, particularly those requiring 24/7 availability. The primary caveat is that all services involve fees; consumers should compare costs against traditional banking alternatives and understand that prepaid cards carry ongoing maintenance expenses that banking accounts do not.
services: Ria Money Transfer (domestic and international wire transfers)
Xpectations! PLUS Debit Mastercard prepaid cards
